title: 10 best herbal essential oils for cough
description: Eucalyptus globulus, also known as Tasmanian blue gum, essential oils helps with cough because of its decongestant and expectorant properties. The oil's primary active compound, eucalyptol, breaks down mucus, making it easier to expel. This leads to rapid relief from congestion and coughs. Additionally, eucalyptus oil's anti-inflammatory properties help reduce swelling in the airways, allowing for better airflow and a smoother breathing experience, providing temporary relief from cough...
